decision-tree.root-question: Are ≥20% of queries multi-hop or global?

branch.question: Is the entity vocabulary closed enough for stable extraction?

branch.conclusion: Adopt GraphRAG. Schema-first; Leiden communities; ≥2 summary levels; query router.
GraphRAG not justified. Iterate vector RAG with re-ranking instead.
Skip GraphRAG. Use vector RAG only.

example.p: Legal corpus, 35% multi-hop queries, closed entity vocab (parties / clauses / obligations) → adopt GraphRAG → r2-schema-first.
